configurations.name: Run Extension
configurations.comment: Launch an Extension Development Host with this extension loaded (F5). Compiles the TypeScript first via the `compile` task.

configurations.name: Quilon: run current file (no breakpoints)
configurations.comment: Trivial run-only config. Real breakpoint/step debugging is NOT supported: the Quilon compiler does not emit DWARF debug info yet. See README.md.
